title: InstaClumps
description:
InstaClumps works like the Clumps, merging nearby XP orbs into bigger ones to reduce lag.
It keeps the exact XP amount so players always get the right XP when picking them up.
Includes settings for XP pickup speed, orb pull range, and TPS-safe merging. 🚀
body:
works like the Clumps, merging nearby XP orbs into bigger ones to reduce lag while keeping the exact XP amount.

Features:

- ⚡ XP Orb Merging – Small XP orbs combine into bigger ones to reduce entity lag.
- 🎯 Correct XP System – Players always receive the exact XP amount when picking up orbs.
- 🧲 Adjustable Orb Pull Range – Configure how far XP orbs can move toward players.
- 🚀 Adjustable Pickup Speed – Change how fast XP orbs fly to players.
- 🛠 TPS-Safe Merging – Smart merge limiter to prevent lag on large servers.
- ⚙ Configurable Settings – Easily adjust values in the config or with commands.
- 💬 Simple Commands – Includes /instaclumps help, /instaclumps speed, and /instaclumps reload that only operators can use.

You can fully customize the XP behavior to match your server’s performance needs.

Join my discord server for plugin updates paid plugins free plugins and plugin related stuff!!:
